Deep Frequency Filtering (DFF) significantly enhances the generalization ability of deep neural networks across domains.

The implementation of DFF with a simple spatial attention in the frequency domain brings stunning performance improvements for domain generalization (DG) by combining signal processing and deep learning technologies.
